content:
# Zeta Potential

**Summary**: The electrokinetic potential in colloidal systems required to bring the particles to rest.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] performed Zeta Potential analysis to determine surface charge.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] Determines the interaction between the adsorbent and charged contaminants.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] Measured as a function of pH.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Surface charges were negative across all pH levels, ranging from -10 to -45 mV. ([[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025, p. 43]])

## Contrasting Values and Interpretations

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] -10 to -45 mV
